name: Submit News to openEuler: Step-by-Step Guide
description: Learn how to submit news to openEuler using Gitee and Markdown. Follow our step-by-step guide to fork, write, and create a pull request.

itemListElement.name: Register a Gitee Account
itemListElement.text: Register a Gitee account by following the instructions at http://git.mydoc.io/?t=179267.

itemListElement.name: Set Primary Email Address
itemListElement.text: Set your primary email address in Gitee personal settings at https://gitee.com/profile/emails.

itemListElement.name: Sign the Contributor License Agreement
itemListElement.text: Sign the openEuler Contributor License Agreement (CLA) at https://www.openeuler.openatom.cn/en/other/cla/.

itemListElement.name: Prepare Your Git Environment
itemListElement.text: Set up your local git environment by following the guide at http://git.mydoc.io/?t=180692.

itemListElement.name: Learn the Markdown Format
itemListElement.text: openEuler news is written in Markdown format. Each news file requires a front-matter header containing: title, date, category, tags, banner, author, sig, and summary fields.

itemListElement.name: Fork the openEuler Website Repository
itemListElement.text: Fork the openEuler website project at https://gitee.com/openeuler/website-v2 to your own Gitee account.

itemListElement.name: Clone the Repository
itemListElement.text: Clone your forked repository locally using: git clone https://gitee.com/<your-gitee-id>/website-v2

itemListElement.name: Create a New Branch
itemListElement.text: Create a new branch for your news submission using: git checkout -b <branch-name>

itemListElement.name: Create Your Working Directory and Write the News File
itemListElement.text: Navigate to the appropriate news directory (e.g., web-ui/docs/en/news), create a folder with your Gitee ID, and create a Markdown file named in the format YEAR-MONTH-DAY-title.md. Place any image or resource files in the same directory.

itemListElement.name: Commit and Submit a Pull Request
itemListElement.text: Stage and commit your news file using git add and git commit, push the branch to your fork, then create a Pull Request on Gitee to the openEuler website-v2 repository.

name: Submit News to openEuler: Step-by-Step Guide
description: Learn how to submit news to openEuler using Gitee and Markdown. Follow our step-by-step guide to fork, write, and create a pull request.
